name: HAEMONETICS CORP
business: Haemonetics is a global medical technology company with three segments: Plasma, Blood Center, and Hospital. Plasma sells automated plasma collection systems and software to biopharmaceutical companies. Blood Center sells blood collection and processing devices to blood centers. Hospital sells vascular closure devices, hemostasis diagnostics, cell salvage systems, and transfusion management software to hospitals.
sellsTo: blood collection groups and independent blood centers

exposures.sentence: Haemonetics is a global medical technology company dedicated to improving the quality, effectiveness and efficiency of health care.

We also offer a portfolio of integrated information technology platforms for plasma customers to manage their donors, operations and supply chain, including our NexLynk DMS donor management system and Donor360 tools.

Our OptoWire pressure guidewire aims to improve clinical outcomes by accurately and consistently measuring fractional flow reserve and diastolic pressure ratio; our SavvyWire is a sensor-guided 3-in-1 guidewire for TAVR procedures.
The TEG 6s system quickly delivers a comprehensive assessment of a patient's hemostasis, giving clinicians the invaluable insight needed to deliver more targeted treatment.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance of NexSys PCS Plasma Collection System with Persona PLUS technology
catalysts.sentence: in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026 we received FDA 510(k) clearance for our NexSys PCS Plasma Collection System with Persona PLUS technology.

catalysts.event: FDA approval to expand indication for VASCADE MVP XL venous vascular closure system
catalysts.sentence: in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026 we received FDA approval to expand the indication for VASCADE MVP XL venous vascular closure system to include procedures using 10-14F inner diameter (ID) and up to 17F outer diameter (OD) procedural sheaths.

catalysts.event: FDA clearance for advancements to NexSys PCS including new plasma collection bowl and Express Plus technology
catalysts.sentence: In fiscal 2024, we received FDA clearance for advancements to NexSys PCS including a new plasma collection bowl and new Express Plus technology engineered to reduce procedure time.
During fiscal 2025, we launched our newest VASCADE product, the VASCADE MVP XL, which utilizes 58% more collagen and a larger disc than the VASCADE MVP system.
On January 9, 2026, we acquired all of the outstanding equity interests of Vivasure for a net purchase price of $164.4 million.

catalysts.event: Submitted PMA application to FDA for PerQseal Elite arterial closure system
catalysts.sentence: we have submitted a premarket approval (PMA) application to the FDA for an arterial indication in the United States.
